title: Apply button loading icon or disable when triggered webhook request
excerpt:
Hi All, 
How to add  when we clicked button in item so it sends webhook request after make it disable or apply some loading spinner icon on button  till it processing  webhook request once we get response from webhook th…

posts.author: vishallimgire (Vishal Limgire)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,
How to add when we clicked button in item so it sends webhook request after make it disable or apply some loading spinner icon on button till it processing webhook request once we get response from webhook then enable it.
Could there is possibility to tweak this kind of logic in graphql ?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @vishallimgire,

Are you referring to a regular button in a button column from a board?

If that is the case, you can not add a loader or disable it after it has been clicked.
